data.industry_and_segment: Wealthtech, Financial Services, Stock Exchanges, Wealth Management
data.key_positioning: AI-enabled wealth advisory app for the mass-affluent segment in India, offering stock trading ideas, portfolio management, and mutual fund analysis.
milestones: Raised $2.2 million in pre-seed funding in August 2022.
Expanded services to NRI investors in six countries.
Reported Rs 25.8 crore in operating revenues in FY25.
Booked a profit of Rs 43 lakh in FY25.
data._phase_b_note: Phase B (deep analysis) failed — all models exhausted.

metadata.title: Liquide-Trade, Invest In Stock
metadata.description:
Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in the stock market and mutual fund investing! As India's premier SEBI Registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience like no other. With Liquide, you can equip yourself with powerful tools, expert insights, and AI-driven solutions, in one place.

Key Features:

1. Stock Trade Recommendations 📈:
Embark on an exciting trading journey with Liquide's curated stock trade recommendations. Whether you're looking for quick wins or long-term our advice spans, Short-term, Mid-term, and Long-term trade recommendations to match your investment goals.

2. Portfolio Health Analysis 📊:
Unlock valuable insights into your investment portfolio within minutes of connecting your broker account. Our portfolio health analysis not only provides a comprehensive score but helps identify potential red flags & ensures sector diversification in your holdings.

3. Mutual Fund Analytics 📊:
Introducing our new Mutual Fund Analytics! Get detailed analytics and insights into mutual funds, identify red flags, and take informed actions. This tool helps you make better investment decisions and optimize your mutual fund portfolio.

4. AI-Powered BOT - LiMo 🤖🗣️:
Meet LiMo, India's pioneering AI-powered BOT! LiMo offers real-time BUY/SELL/HOLD ratings for stocks and serves as your round-the-clock trading partner. Whether you're seeking advice or just looking to chat about stocks, LiMo is here to provide instant guidance.

5. IPO Verdicts 💡:
Stay ahead of the IPO game with Liquide's IPO verdicts. We provide expert insights to help you make informed decisions about upcoming Initial Public Offerings. Don't miss out on exciting investment opportunities.

6. Watchlist 📺👀:
Effortlessly track your favorite stocks by adding them to your personalized watchlist. Stay updated on daily market movements with ease, ensuring you never miss a beat.

7. Stock Alerts 🚨💰:
Take control of your investments by setting personalized stock price alerts. Liquide will notify you the moment your desired price is reached, ensuring you never miss a trading opportunity again.

8. Stock Insights 📰🔍:
Dive deep into the stock market with Liquide's real-time news signals and detailed stock insights. Stay informed and make strategic decisions with confidence, armed with the latest information.

9. Market Sentiment 📊🗞️:
Get a daily pulse on the market with our market sentiment feature. Stay ahead of market trends and make informed investment choices based on the prevailing mood.

10. Baskets 📦✨:
Introducing Liquide's Baskets, curated collections of stocks, ETFs, and gold designed to help you diversify your portfolio. Our Baskets are crafted to cater to different investment strategies, making it easier for you to spread risk and optimize returns.

11. Academy 🎓📚:
Empower yourself with knowledge through our exclusive Academy. Access over 100 hours of in-depth stock market courses, designed to help you learn and grow in the world of investing. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced investor, there's always room to enhance your skills.

Liquide is more than just an app; it's your trusted partner for stock market and mutual fund success. 
FAQs:
1. Do you hold my money or stocks?
No, we don’t! All trades are safely executed through your broker.
2. Do you share my social and portfolio data with anyone?
No, no and no! Your data is secure with us and not shared with anyone.
3. Do you buy or sell on my behalf?
Not at all! You make your own decisions - be it buying or selling, we don’t take action for you.
4. Can I delete my Liquide account?
If you wish to delete your account, please email us at support@liquide.life. Security - Multiple layers of protection ensure that your data is safe and secure.
Liquide is a SEBI registered Research Analyst, Registration no. INH000009816
DISCLAIMER:
Stock investing is subject to market risks. Please trade with extreme care and do your own research before investing in stocks

reviews.author: Navneet Singh
reviews.content: The app appears to share trade information only after the trade has been closed, presenting it as a successful achievement. You won't receive prior notifications about trades. Although the app claims an 85% accuracy rate in notifications, the trades are often closed before any notification is captured. Later, they are displayed in the app as "open" and "closed" trades. Initially, I thought I might be missing the notifications, so I set the app to priority it but the issue persisted.

reviews.author: Shraban Sen
reviews.content: The experience is worst. All the advice given through WhatsApp is not acceptable. The profit % shown by the app. is wrong and baseless. Interestingly, I want to share my experience of the so called 'arjun' plan. First, the discount was 40% for 1 year subscription and when I didnt subscribe the discount rate increased to 60%. And the app always recommend subscription of 1 year. By which after payment the dissatisfied customer can't do anything.

reviews.author: premdeep singh
reviews.content: -5 star.I won't recommend it. I have invested in 5 of their suggestions 2 hit stop loss and others are around 15% loss.Save your money and stay away from this app. They send thousands of useless notifications on mobile and whatsapp even after doing stop on whatsapp and stopping app as well. no use app. useless. I complained on their support for stopping 50+ notifications per day. they don't solve instead close tickets. sometimes 24hrs window still nothing and told me to close app notifications.

reviews.author: PRAVVEEN KUMAR VAITLA
reviews.content: Don't purchase thus app, no one responding and Mutual fund profoikio not working from past 3 months, and what ever calls you get all are very false, waste of money, don't be trap in discount package messages...Wrost and very pathetic. I lost money paying subscription....

reviews.author: Pavan Kota
reviews.content: Just money looters. i have paid for subscription but it was not getting reflected. i contacted the chat service and even raised a ticket. but entire team seems to be sleeping. no one is responding

reviews.author: Harish Nimgade
reviews.content: 1. Every time opens the app shows too much adds and offer for buying plans. 2. The analysis of Stocks is some time valid, and no flash trades available. etc.

reviews.author: Soumyajit
reviews.content: Worst app experience, they delete trades which hit SL, I took a trade it's in loss and I can't even find that trade on the app now.

reviews.author: Sunny Singh
reviews.content: worst experience. I just purchased today and got 4 trades in app and all were losses. inside app they have mentioned that we as of now only handle banknifty and nifty but in reality they are giving trades for equity also which is a loss. when I am asking for refund after seeing this then agents are telling me to wait and use the subscription for one month and then we will see and review everything and the let me know. I don't understand if I don't want to use your subscription then refund it.

reviews.author: snehil sahu
reviews.content: Never go for this app and its subscription. All fake recommendations for equity. Always a loss case. The black subscription is worst. No one will follow up with you as promised while buying it. No weekly or monthly recommendations provided after opting for its premium subscription black. Dont waste your money in the app.

reviews.author: Rustam Singh Nongmaithem
reviews.content: Avoid Liquide Black - All sales, no service Rating: ⭐ ​"Horrible experience so far. Liquide Black is quick to take your money, but provides zero support afterward. The program lacks transparency, onboarding is painfully slow, and the broker integration simply does not work. It feels like a half-baked product with no backend support. Strongly recommend staying away."

reviews.author: Gauranga Kripa
reviews.content: Very disappointing experience with Liquide. I paid Rs 24999 for the Combo subscription after being promised 90 percent profitable calls and a no questions asked refund policy. In just two weeks, I lost around Rs 21000 due to low accuracy calls. Many calls were shared after the price had already moved. When I requested cancellation, the process was delayed and my ticket was closed without resolution. Not satisfied with the service or support.

reviews.author: Ujjwal Tyagi
reviews.content: App is fraud, they will give 100s of trade and some are right they will show that our predictions is correct & brand it like every trade is correct. While most of the trades are wrong & they even don't show that data again in their app interface.

reviews.author: birendra vishwakarma
reviews.content: once you buy thay offer again for premium subscription very bad experience, not good, false tips for short term, medium and long term investment.

reviews.author: Indian Grooves
reviews.content: Its a big scam do not buy their subscription. 90% of their stocks are in loss. Right when check past trades to know their performance, when you click on the past trades. Go to ongoing section and check their performance. Only then you buy.

reviews.author: Jyotirmay Anand
reviews.content: Very Slow app and tells us what we know already and that too very late. Its ai LIMO is even worst gives answers very late that too vague. Not woth spending 6-7000 on it.

reviews.author: Manu
reviews.content: this one is not good aap i purchased this app for a whole year but they never send any best trade i purchased 4-5 stocks for the long term. But all are in loss and now they want more money for trades . I strongly didn't recommend this app for trades.

reviews.author: Kapil Saxena
reviews.content: App designed only to capture annual subscription from the clients. no substantial evidence that their levels actually works or not. Their primary focus is on annual subscriptions only. these type of apps keep the clients in dark. Not trustworthy as per my recommendation.

reviews.author: Rithik Rai
reviews.content: they have totally lost focus to be honest. They used to give great recommendations before but now the recommendations are totally off! some of them have been there for a year or two and have just gone down down. They just keep pushing their new product that is "Arjun" asking liquide users to buy that and their normal liquide app is now a back burner for these guys. Their founder keeps giving lectures on Linkedin about the whole world but their app recommendations are going down the drain.

reviews.author: Vijayan Ramamoorthy
reviews.content: I am having issues to receive OTP SMS for my mobile number in this app. when I contacted support team, they are not responding to my query for almost 2 weeks. Very worst support service.

reviews.author: Smit Aghera
reviews.content: This is an Real Review....I took Options membership...Don't take any Paid membership...All Results shown are wrong...Profit shown is Totally wrong...they give wrong Entry and Exit points...and profit Calculation is also fake...For,cost to cost shown in trades...we actually incur Losses...& in Profits shown...actual profit is way too less than shown...same with losses...losses shown are far too more than actual loss shown...they Manipulate all data so as to loot people and attract new customers.

reviews.author: Sukesh Sonnad
reviews.content: Hi All, I am writing this feedback so that you guys don't waste your money on this application the data what they present is available in the Google itself for free 1.I have purchased one year plan made 0 rupees from this application 2. I got a call from their member for the first time when my subscription was ending where the person was asking any difficulties I am facing 3.They are telling that there are some message trigger will happen through message and what's app where I didn't see any

reviews.author: Kavan Palangappa
reviews.content: I purchased the plan on Jan 1st, since then they recommend a good number of stocks and 80% of it is in loss. It not recommend for short term investors.

reviews.author: Satish Jeevannavar
reviews.content: Don't subscribe and don't waste your money. they will give you a buy call, if the market moves down side then they will remove the call from the provided list....

reviews.author: Nazish Khan
reviews.content: Uninstalling because the notification provided about the budget was false and misleading. When you don't understand this clearly then this application is not useful.

reviews.author: Vijay 001
reviews.content: better to invest ur amount in any good stock for long-term by avoiding this membership the worst app I can say

reviews.author: Saneesh V K
reviews.content: Download and subscribe their plans only if you want to wash out your hard earned money. It's high time SEBI to stop such advisor apps.

reviews.author: Ravikant Grewal
reviews.content: please not purchase the subscription. App not working properly. No contact support.

reviews.author: ALIK GARAI
reviews.content: Never trust their judgement. 95% of the stocks or options they suggest make losses. 5% that make profit they show them and advertise. Better you learn and follow your own rules. I can say, you can trust yourself after learning from YouTube and trust me you will perform much better than their suggestions.

reviews.author: Manoj
reviews.content: Liquide gives too many unnecessary notifications of selling their packages even when im already their custumer & at times they won't give important notification of EXIT, that they send it via telegram. This needs serious revisit from implementation team.

reviews.author: justin jacob
reviews.content: blunder suggestions, I was about to buy eternal stock and I asked for the suggestion it advised me to avoid and within 2 weeks the stocks went up, same happend with adani green stocks as well.

reviews.author: Samanvith Raj
reviews.content: This app never indicates correct point of entry and exit. It gives the indica tion only after market hours are ended... The unwanted notifications are high in this app and are not very useful. Not a recommended app.

reviews.author: Santosh Pai
reviews.content: My order is stuck from last 7 days without any support from Liquide. Technical issues, orders failed, money lost. Support email is waste of time and no escalation path. Fake compliance email id given in their web portal. I wonder how SEBI gave them approval for running the show.

reviews.author: Sanjay Jadhav
reviews.content: Bad service, no customer care number, only chat answers, don't buy specially options, losses are more than profit, chat answer after 10 mins worst service, on telegram only option to give good signal

reviews.author: Inderdeep Singh
reviews.content: i have purchased 2 year plan but worst thing is that they send their membership advertisement notification which we can't cancel without opening the app.

reviews.author: delli babu
reviews.content: Not getting calls ontime and once they ask to exit because of down fall options after exit if the calls goes up they telling it's a profit 😠😠 50-50 chance only getting which we normally do with ourself

reviews.author: shereef vappy
reviews.content: The app is good, but never ever opt for the premium service. Customer service is pathetic. I face some issues in app, I paid for the premium plan and for the past 5 days there has been no proper response or call—only the same automated message every day. In a volatile market like this, such delays are unacceptable. The funny part? I accidentally clicked on their Options service (another premium feature) and got a marketing call immediately. But once you’ve paid, there’s no service at all.

reviews.author: INDERDEEP SINGH
reviews.content: Everything is good. buy some notifications comes with no option to clear those notification without opening it. app forces the user to open such notification. one notification is to buy their f&o. If a user don't want f&o subscription then what is the purpose to push such notofications which can't clear without opening the app.

reviews.author: Priyanshu Kumar
reviews.content: very bad app while rebalancing from app.. it not me very major setback

reviews.author: Abhishek Salian
reviews.content: App is extremely good and super useful... But what worst thing they have done is as soon as you open the app... A full add for options trading is displayed with small skip button.. clicking on that redirects user to purchase screen! Please remove that banner as I am not at all interested in options tranding!!!! Still 2-3 banners welcome you.. when you open the app! reducing 1 more star...

reviews.author: Saif Shaikh
reviews.content: Worst experience ever. I used this app for 12 months, and it’s nothing but a money-making advertisement machine. There is almost no real analysis or value—just nonstop ads shoved in your face. It feels like a complete scam to charge users and then bombard them with promotions instead of delivering what was promised. Total waste of time, effort, and hard-earned money. Highly disappointing and absolutely not recommended.

reviews.author: Anupam Mukherjee
reviews.content: They recommend stocks when it has already started rising, so when they recommend the price if they recommend 150, when you will actually open your app and buy it will become 155, also lately most of their recommendations resulting in loss,in the notification they will mention we got 18 profit,19 profit,but in real life most of them results in losses.

reviews.author: Karan Padhiyar
reviews.content: i recently made a purchase of liquide one plan. The money was deducted from my bank, however no plan was activated and there is no response from customer support too. This is plain horrible. I want a refund of my money.

reviews.author: A watcher
reviews.content: They suggest trades with past values. Its a clear scam. They'll say but at 100rs, target is 125rs and even if you open the trading app in 2 seconds, the price is already 104-105. You think target is way high, so u buy at 105. As soon as the price goes up to 106-107, they notify to book partial profit and move stop loss to 100 - at cost. Later they show in result of 7rs profit earned. Whereas, actually you earn only 1 or 2 rs that too if you're quick enough to book it. Else -5 loss at 100rs SL.

reviews.author: Jayant Kulkarni
reviews.content: Improve your App experience, notification when clicked does not open app or sometimes does not open with appropriate detail as per notification..

reviews.author: Kudari Roshan
reviews.content: Most of their trade recommendations are sham, especially the one showing a high upside. Not very trustworthy.

reviews.author: naveen prakash Yadav
reviews.content: They showed first that their targets are being hit daily, but when you take subscription and pay money, you are asked to take another plans. You will not get correct recommendations and whatever they give, next day they will ask to exit. However the messages come to your inbox or on whatsapp that 8 out of 9 targets hit. Now for those tips you have to take one more subscription

reviews.author: Rajiv Kumar
reviews.content: It's a good app, no doubt int that. Though the problem is their recommendation comes very fast and it's not always possible to complete the transaction right after getting recommendations. Most of the time, after getting recommendations, by the time I open app to complete the transaction, the stock moved out of price range. It's only for short term trades. Also for short term trades it'd useful only for large capital, otherwise after deductions of all the chargs, you left with nominal profit.

reviews.author: sharad tiwari
reviews.content: If you want an app that just tell you buy or not to buy (mostly buy will be the answer) . There is no details report analysis of the company for your understanding. The news they provide are mostly link to trade view or moneycontrol which are again limited . Charts do not have access of full controls of functions as they are third party. Look like I wasted my money

reviews.author: Chinmoy Bhattacharya
reviews.content: It's a mediocre app...they calculate their returns in the most optimistic way which are nearly impossible to execute by use. The high rating seems that they are not genuine nature. The app is good for getting details about particular stock but that information is usually free at other sites

reviews.author: Mohammad Ameenuddin
reviews.content: I used this app for a while, but it's not suitable for beginners at all. The app seems fine initially, but as soon as you start asking about stocks, it demands coins. And to purchase those coins, it charges an exorbitant amount. This app is not worth it for beginners, as you could buy some good stocks with that much money. Therefore, I'm giving this app only 2 stars.

reviews.author: Anil Upadhyay
reviews.content: Tried to Synch my portfolio in HDFC securities (my Broker) to Liquide app but only mutual fund was synced and stocks were not synced with the app. Pl resolve the issue.

reviews.author: M Mittal
reviews.content: Just uninstalled after 10 days. Could not even use to suggest others in group how good or effective app it is and it started asking for making purchase of coin. Paid moneycontrol 100rs for pro membership n got much better info. Should give an year of free access so people like me can look at numbers from stocks picled up based on reports.

reviews.author: Agenda Baddy
reviews.content: No IPO updates now, which this app previously used to provide. Also one of the big broker INDmoney is also missing. Then howcome I can think of proceeding with the services.

reviews.author: Rajkumar gupta (Raj)
reviews.content: I don't understand why contacts, photos, videos, purchase history data is being collected! I don't buy it ! If it were only to provide the stocks insights. Highly sensitive data is comprised! I won't recommend! I belive the app's motive is just more than the providing tech details!

reviews.author: Anirban Mohanty (am954)
reviews.content: I came across Liquide through one of their Instagram ads. While the video lectures and content are quite good and should be used by all amateur traders, their recommendations are quite bad in my experience. I have mostly booked losses on their recommendations despite their cadence reports of beating the market. I won't recommend this to people who want to blindly trust stock recos.

reviews.author: Srijan Eppalapally
reviews.content: The btst recommendations, which is their flagship offering are very difficult to make use of. Most of their recommendations offer a potential upside of 2-3% . The stocks surge the recommended buy range rapidly in a matter of minutes, which leaves us in a situation which is as good as not having their subscription.

reviews.author: jetty vijaymohan
reviews.content: This app was good provideding some good information but the main problem is that i am unable to delink my brokerage account there is no such option there was no response no proper communication to reach out only WhatsApp through they were not responsible immediately don't add your broker account once you link you can't delink yourself they can't do it from there end but we will do it but they don't there is chance to misuse of your portfolio data leaks

reviews.author: Ayush Sanghavi
reviews.content: App has good features but everything inside is costing money which is the worst thing. Even Groww and AngelOne don't ask for money we can invest anywhere and about knowledge they also have good predicting skills. Just making a good looking UI don't work. Remove payment option and then you will get more success. Or else you are cursed.

reviews.author: Bala R
reviews.content: I like the app's UI. But, many holdings in your portfolio doesn't show up correctly in Liquide. The app developers should ensure that the portfolio holdings should be synced properly to reflect the actual holdings to get a real picture of how our portfolio performs.

reviews.author: Sachin Raj
reviews.content: Not a good experience so far!! There is issue in basket as it keeps on giving prompt for repair with higher amount. Return from basket is not good as well !! Support team is also not much helpful.

reviews.author: chander singh
reviews.content: As I read the reviews of existing customers, giving trade is maximum in loss, sebi has to sticky take action on this liquide app, against cheating people by changing as well as the loss making calls, pls don't believe on this kind of app, there target to sell you app and make money, if they have such kind of information then this app will be the king of share market 🤔🤔🤔🤔

reviews.author: Akhil Anishetty
reviews.content: App has some bugs and it's bit slow in responding, subscription price is bit high compared to others in market. Sometimes suggestions or stock recommendations are delayed.

reviews.author: Paras Arora
reviews.content: Very low accuracy, both in terms of stocks and targets. You can't count exiting the trade super early (at practically cost price), rather than reaching target, as a win.

reviews.author: kaushik pandey
reviews.content: Hi the Growww Banking & Financial Services Fund Direct Growth is not showing on your application section of mutual funds even though it is showing on various other platform of such small case and groww when mutal funds are sync with them. It's only your application that doesn't show it even after repeatedly sync it with my MF

reviews.author: Raavi Lakra
reviews.content: Paid for subscription but it is not activated. Reports generated for stocks are very clear which will help in taking decisions. I will reconsider the rating after the subscriptions problem is solved.

reviews.author: amarjot singh
reviews.content: The app is just fine.. I hate the constant whatsapp msgs they keep sending the entire day to promote their offers... u cant block that chat as recommendations are also on this whatsapp only....fed up of their msgs day n night... the recommendation provided are just ok...

reviews.author: yash lakkar
reviews.content: Unlike its competitors, it does not provide cheaper plans for shorter duration, to me plans for shorter duration is a trial duration, how does the application functions, what is the accuracy percentage,etc. basically its a bit absurd to commit for 12months or so without even know much, though there is a plan for 3 month duration, but compared to other competitors its quite expensive...no doubt its UI is user friendly, but there should be cheaper plans for shorter duration!..

reviews.author: Keshav Chhabra
reviews.content: Most of the trades suggested end up in loss. They boast of 80-90% success ratio but different in reality. Don't suggest to others. Keep your money safe. Further there are cross selling options as well. God knows !

reviews.author: Abhishek Xaxa
reviews.content: Best experience but something were missing one more thing is very unuseful to us and that is reffer and earn.. the app promise they will give you 1000 coins when anyone download with your refferal link but they only give 50 coins. They tell you that anyone who download with your refferal link and when they add their demat account you earn up to 1000 rs but they give only 25 points.. Very unveliable..don't install and don't trap in refferal bonous🤬🤬🤬🤬

reviews.author: Manish Jain
reviews.content: They failed to address the issue and no proper response. I have shared you the screen recording of the problem I am facing, you can check my emails.

reviews.author: Mayank Maria
reviews.content: Not very useful. They just create F&O fomo via most of their updates as that is a different subscription. And now transitioning away from Whatsapp to Telegram.

reviews.author: Mohsin Bhai
reviews.content: very bad experience you can't see entry or exit and also sl in any stock which is recommended. Providing price like buy at 120-129 and sometimes they close at 126and telling 6% profit

reviews.author: abel john
reviews.content: The app is slow & sometimes don't work or respond. I have to close the app mutiple times & reopen it again. Also I don't find this app of help.

reviews.author: Anshul Ahuja
reviews.content: Trade recommendations are mostly a fluke. Scalping for 1-2 % profits while getting bad hits on loss trades. Haven't been able to even recoup the fees i paid in months, while using a large capital

reviews.author: Arpan Abani

metadata.description:
Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in stock market and mutual fund investing!
As India’s premier SEBI-registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience like no other. With curated stock market tools, Liquide is your personal stock investment guide and advisor, right at your fingertips.

Key Features:
1. Stock Trade Recommendations
Whether you're looking for short-term opportunities or long-term strategies, our stock advisor provides recommendations to align with your investment objectives. Whether you're experienced or just starting, we ensure the best support for your journey.
2. F&O Recommendations 
Elevate your trading experience with Futures and Options (F&O), integrated seamlessly within the app. Gain access to advanced F&O strategies and stay ahead with timely insights to help you navigate the market.
3. Portfolio Health Analysis 
Our portfolio health analysis helps you assess your portfolio's overall strength, highlights areas of concer
